name: Cyber-Rayquaza (Neon Apex)
description: A cybernetically enhanced form of Rayquaza built with futuristic nanite alloys. It patrols the digital and physical stratosphere of the Aetherium.
originLore: Created by blending Rayquaza's sky-sovereign DNA with high-frequency quantum nanites. It can convert atmospheric ozone into pure energy.

lore.celestialConcordance: Cyber-Rayquaza monitors the digital grid and ozone boundary, intercepting rogue meteors and corrupted data streams.

quantumResonators.name: Cyber Ascent
quantumResonators.description: Rockets into the digital stratosphere at sub-light speed, unleashing a salvo of plasma homing missiles.

quantumResonators.name: Nanite Atmosphere
quantumResonators.description: Deploys a barrier of microscopic nanites that neutralize weather phenomena and status effects.
